title: One line to influence them all
display_title: One line to influence them all
summary:
[]: One line to influence them all....             Quote Post by Kyle » Mon Nov 17, 2008 5:33 pm If you could enter an eva characters dreams for one night and say one sentance to influence them,what would you say? Words of hate?Of love?Of sympathy? Or would you just yell..."LET'S GO LEEROOOOOYY JEEEENKINS!!!!!!!!"

chunks.content:
Article: One line to influence them all
[]: One line to influence them all....             Quote Post by Kyle » Mon Nov 17, 2008 5:33 pm If you could enter an eva characters dreams for one night and say one sentance to influence them,what would you say? Words of hate?Of love?Of sympathy? Or would you just yell..."LET'S GO LEEROOOOOYY JEEEENKINS!!!!!!!!"

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Mon Nov 17, 2008 6:29 pm Assuming I would be in a lucid dream state while contacting them, I would go as cyborg Jesus and scream "STOP BEING A DICK".

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Mon Nov 17, 2008 6:35 pm I'd say something like this at 0:17.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 17, 2008 6:46 pm "You are really an anime character!"

[]:             Quote Post by jim_loves_randy » Mon Nov 17, 2008 6:57 pm "Hundreds of lonely men around the world masturbate to drawings of you!"

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Nov 17, 2008 8:43 pm "Shinji, just keep on living no matter what, it's the only way you'll become happy with yourself and others."

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Mon Nov 17, 2008 11:14 pm "Yo Shinji! Shut the fuck up, stop being a sook, and live with the times!"

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Mon Nov 17, 2008 11:37 pm "Hey Shinji, you're a great pilot. Your actions have led to *only* a couple of thousand of deaths, and by golly, if you keep it up, you'll keep it under 10,000 by the time if you're done. So go on, keep piloting the Eva. No pressure."

[]:             Quote Post by Count A'ight » Mon Nov 17, 2008 11:41 pm To any of the pilots: "When you see Unit 03, aim for the legs; this will neutralize the threat without harming the pilot

Article: One line to influence them all
 Quote Post by Count A'ight » Mon Nov 17, 2008 11:41 pm To any of the pilots: "When you see Unit 03, aim for the legs; this will neutralize the threat without harming the pilot" --- To Shinji: "Rei needs a hug... and your baloney pony."

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Mon Nov 17, 2008 11:44 pm To Shinji: "Rei needs a hug... and your baloney pony."

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Nov 18, 2008 2:01 am to Dr. Katsuragi (before the divorce): "It's like this; you can either save your marriage by easing up on the work now, or go on like you are and be responsible for wiping humanity off the planet in less than 20 years."

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Tue Nov 18, 2008 10:26 am Shinji, I prefer cherry-flavored condoms. Meet me behind the 7-Eleven in an hour.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Nov 18, 2008 3:56 pm Shinji, believe in you who believes in yourself. GIGAAAAAAAA DRILLLLLLLLLLL MMMMMMMMMMMMBREEEEEEEAAAAAAAAAAAKERRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRR!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Tue Nov 18, 2008 3:59 pm Asuka, their all going to laugh at you. One free internet for whoever gets that line.

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Tue Nov 18, 2008 6:07 pm To Shinji: Kawrou is a trap !!!!! Guard your ringpiece !!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Nov 18, 2008 6:12 pm Asuka, their all going to laugh at you.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Tue Nov 18, 2008 6:16 pm To Rei: Shinji wants your fuzz on his face. Same goes for Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Nov 18, 2008 7:24 pm

Article: One line to influence them all
2008 6:16 pm To Rei: Shinji wants your fuzz on his face. Same goes for Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Nov 18, 2008 7:24 pm "Shinji! KICK REASON TO THE CURB! BELIEVE IN THE YOU THAT BELIEVES IN YOURSELF! PIERCE THE HEAVENS WITH YOUR DRILL! NO, NOT THAT DRILL! WHAT ARE YOU DOING TO THAT COMATOSE REDHEAD!?!?"

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Wed Nov 19, 2008 4:01 am "Hey Gendo, Rei is gonna betray you when you use her to try and cause 3I. Seriously, don't do it, she'll turn into one fucked up monstrosity."

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Nov 19, 2008 4:39 am "Akagi Ritsuko hakase, honto ni...mom's gonna betray you, so you better think of something else."
